messages.text: Hey Craig, got a quote request from the Hendersons — they want Calacatta for their kitchen island. Can you check slab availability?
messages.extractedTask: Check Calacatta slab availability for Henderson kitchen island

messages.text: Supplier confirmed 4 slabs Statuario shipping Thursday. Delivery ETA next Tuesday.
Payment received from Cole Harbour — $4,200 e-transfer came through this morning.
Met with Coastal Properties rep yesterday — they want countertops for all 12 units. Quartz throughout. Need a bulk price.
messages.extractedTask: Prepare bulk pricing for Coastal Properties — 12-unit countertop deal

messages.text: Robbie Roberts texted — wants to meet March 24-27 about granite remnants for a barbecue prep station. I said we might be heading to Florida. Need to confirm.
messages.extractedTask: Confirm Robbie Roberts meeting March 24-27 — granite remnants for BBQ prep station

messages.text: What adhesive do we want to use on the airport job? The Mapei or the Laticrete? Surface is different than what we quoted for.
messages.extractedTask: Decide adhesive for airport job — Mapei vs Laticrete, surface issue

messages.text: Finished reviewing the Livingstone invoices from February. Found a $162 discrepancy on the Morrison job — they're saying we owe more. My numbers don't match.
messages.extractedTask: Resolve $162 Livingstone discrepancy on Morrison job — Shelley's numbers don't match LS

messages.text: Craig — I checked the airport invoice like you asked. The bill was never sent. Shelley started it but only put 5 hours on it. Should have been 40 hours at $80/hr.
messages.extractedTask: Fix airport invoice — Shelley logged 5hrs, should be 40hrs at $80/hr ($3,200). Bill never sent.
